meta.entry_rules: Signals generated by bull/weak engines; entries at next session open when signal date regime matches engine.
meta.exit_rules: Per-candidate TP/SL logic from strategy; exits use planned exit date close in portfolio simulation.
meta.regime_filter_logic: Regime filter uses SPY vs SMA200: Bull engine above SMA200, Weak engine below SMA200.
meta.signal_price_vs_pnl_price: Signals use adjusted-close indicators; portfolio fills use raw open/close with slippage and commissions.
